item.title: I realise how lucky I am to both have a dad who was interested i...
item.description:
View on Instagram


I realise how lucky I am to both have a dad who was interested in cars and patient enough to teach me.I also realise that not everyone has the same opportunity.I don‚Äôt know where my ‚Äúplatform‚Äù is taking me but do know that my underlying mission is make classic cars more accessible to others who want to embrace them as a hobby and to keep them on the road. To help do this I have created an in person workshop: A beginner‚Äôs guide to classic cars.I‚Äôll be sharing all my knowledge on classic cars construction, comportments and basic maintenance. If you‚Äôve always wanted to learn more about classic cars but didn‚Äôt know where to start? This is the workshop for you.It will be a hands-on day, where you‚Äôll learn everything from preventing rust (so you don‚Äôt end up with a car like Trouble) to bleeding brakes, lowering suspension, diagnosing engine faults and even cracking classic car electrics (yes, really).You don‚Äôt need any experience. Just bring your curiosity and get ready to get stuck in ‚Äî with real tools, real skills and a real classic car! It‚Äôs on Saturday 3rd May. There are Limited spaces available as it will be a small group. Please drop me a message if you have any questions or want to book your spot - don‚Äôt miss this one.#classiccarworkshop #learncars #classiccars #carmaintenance #carmaintenancetips #beginnersclassiccarworkshop #handsonlearning #carculture #carenthusiasts #cardiy #diymechanic #howdocarswork

item.title: This is Trouble‚Ä¶She might not be as shiny as the other Porsche...
item.description:
View on Instagram


This is Trouble‚Ä¶She might not be as shiny as the other Porsches you see on Instagram these days but I am making it my mission to turn her back to her former glory!I will be restoring her with the help of friends & family. This Instagram page will be dedicated to her journey! Follow along if you‚Äôre interested in watching her transformation. #porsche #porsche356 #porscheclassic #porscheclub #porschelife #classiccars #classiccarrestoration #restorationproject #relatable #carguyproblems #carguysbelike #356restoration #thestoryoftrouble #followmyjourney #carmotivation

item.title: We knew she wasn‚Äôt perfect but we weren‚Äôt quite anticipating...
item.description:
View on Instagram


We knew she wasn‚Äôt perfect but we weren‚Äôt quite anticipating this much iron oxide‚Ä¶ Hence, she was named Trouble. She might have a few flaws but what this does mean is that she‚Äôs incredibly original & we‚Äôve made quite a few fun discoveries about her & her past. We‚Äôre excited to share these all with you. Please follow along if you‚Äôre interested in her journey as we work to restore her to her former glory! Comment below if you think Trouble is a suitable name for her. üôåüèº#porsche #porsche356 #356 #356b #super90 #porscherestoration #carrestoration #vintagerestoration #vintagecar #classiccar #classicporsche #problemchild #rustbucket #barnfind

item.title: This one hurt.My dad‚Äôs always said‚Ä¶‚ÄúWatch your knuckles.‚Ä...
item.description:
View on Instagram


This one hurt.My dad‚Äôs always said‚Ä¶‚ÄúWatch your knuckles.‚ÄùWise words. When a bolt finally gives, it usually sends your hand flying into something hard, sharp or both.When these little grease nipples started to put up a fight I had my dad‚Äôs voice in my head. Not wanting to put my fist through the table, I decided to flip the spanner over and pull up instead‚Ä¶.What he didn‚Äôt warn me about? Smacking my other hand WITH the spanner.I now have a skinned and swollen thumb knuckle.It‚Äôs amazing what damage a 9mm spanner can do!What‚Äôs your worst garage accident?#porscherestoration #restorationlife #classiccarrestoration #learnaboutcars #howtoremoveagreasenipple #oldcar #oldcarparts #builtnotbought #spanner #spannerslip #garagework #overalls #oldporschebuild #carbuild #projectcar

item.title: This is a sign to not give up on your passions and your hobbies....
item.description:
View on Instagram


This is a sign to not give up on your passions and your hobbies.I don‚Äôt know where they will take you.BUTI do know that if you don‚Äôt give up, they might take you somewhere‚Ä¶. I‚Äôm holding my first classic car workshop on 3rd May in Hampshire (UK). I never in my wildest dreams thought this would be something I would go on to do.Am I excited?Yes. I‚Äôm absolutely buzzing. I‚Äôve been passionate about cars, fixing things with my hands and raiding my dad‚Äôs toolbox for a VERY long time. I‚Äôve learnt a lot on the way (which is why I felt semi-ish confident taking on a project as a big as trouble in the first place). As this account has grown, I‚Äôve realised I want to be able to help others to practically do the same which is why I‚Äôve launched this workshop as well as other things like my weekly newsletter where I share my car restoration ‚ÄúTrouble shooting‚Äù tips. If you want to learn more about classic cars & classic car maintenance and would like to join me for my workshop, drop me a message.#carrestoration #projectcar #porscherestoration #learnaboutcars #howcarswork #classiccars #classiccarsforbeginners #porsche #classicporsche #garagetime #garagetherapy #menshealth #needahug #builtnotbought #relatable

item.title: This has been one hell of a roller coaster and it‚Äôs probably j...
item.description:
View on Instagram


This has been one hell of a roller coaster and it‚Äôs probably just the beginning. I quit my 9-5 in 2020 to pursue my dream of working for myself.It wasn‚Äôt quite like the ‚Äúsuccess stories‚Äù you read online. It was arguably the opposite‚Ä¶.I‚Äôve done a lot of different things over the last few years in my pursuit of self employment. But sadly they ALL had the same end result - failure of some shape or form (at least in my eyes they didn‚Äôt create the version of success I had imagined).I hit rock bottom mentally in autumn of 2023. I‚Äôm not sure what motivated me (maybe I was looking for an escape) but during this time, I reignited a forgotten hobby and started restoring this rusty Porsche. This was a car that I spent all my sisters and my savings on back in 2019 - a Porsche that my family had been calling Trouble because she was too ‚Äúfar gone‚Äù.This rusty little car might continue to spend all our money but she has changed my life:- I‚Äôve grown a huge community of classic car lovers (or people who just love watching what I do whether that be it on social media or my YouTube).- I‚Äôve worked with some amazing brands who have kindly supported her journey (brands I used to dream of working with as a kid).- I‚Äôve launched a weekly newsletter sharing everything I know about working on classics and how to restore things. This is read by hundreds of you every week!- I‚Äôve met the most amazing people (lots of which are now friends). I would never have imagined any of this to be true back in 2020. This week I‚Äôm taking things up a gear‚Ä¶.I‚Äôm launching my first classic car workshop.A Beginner‚Äôs Guide to Classic Cars with Lawrence Todd.Am I nervous?Yes.But would any of this have happened if I didn‚Äôt get out my comfort zone?No‚Ä¶. I would still be stuck at my desk. The path to success isn‚Äôt about never failing. It‚Äôs about moving from failure to failure without losing enthusiasm.I‚Äôm not stopping any time soon. Drop me a message if you would like more details about the workshop. I‚Äôm making it my mission to help others who want to pursue this dream too - it really is possible. #porsche #porscherestoration #classiccar #classiccarrestoration #oldcar

item.title: This was a mess!I should have drained the oil out of the steerin...
item.description:
View on Instagram


This was a mess!I should have drained the oil out of the steering box BEFORE I decided to strip it down.BUTI didn‚Äôt. Looking back, it was obvious this was going to happen but I was too eager to strip it down and just didn‚Äôt engage brain.Some lessons are learned the hard way‚Ä¶ Steering box: 1 - Me: 0. Anyone else had a ‚Äòwhat have I done?‚Äô moment mid wrench? Drop your best (or worst) mistakes in the comments! #classiccarrestoration #porsche356 #garagefail #porschesteeringbox #steeringbox #learnaboutcars #carrestoration #projectcar #restoration #adultlego

item.title: Passion project or waste of time? I know where I stand. Trouble ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Passion project or waste of time? I know where I stand. Trouble is the ultimate passion project for me.I love every hour I spend in the garage and get excited thinking about those that are to come.Anyone who thinks I‚Äôm wasting my life doesn‚Äôt know what it means to make art.What‚Äôs something you‚Äôd spend hours on without regret? Let me know in the comments!#carrestoration #projectcar #classiccarproject #classiccarrestoration #classicporsche #porsche #passionproject #chasingdreams #drivevintage #porsche356 #makingart #myvision #myideaoffun #mypassion #relatable

item.title: What do you think of my pedal box? It has been one of my favouri...
item.description:
View on Instagram


What do you think of my pedal box? It has been one of my favourite transformations so far. What a before and after! üî•Once everything is clean, restored and ready to be assembled, restoring a (classic) car really is just like adult Lego!You have all the bits and assemble them in the order the exploded diagram shows. You don‚Äôt even have to remember how it all goes together.It is hands down my FAVOURITE part of restoring. Everything is clean and assembles as it should. The only thing you sometimes have to fight with are springs‚Ä¶ Anyway, the pedal box is finished. Next up, the steering box!Follow along if you want to see more transformations like this! #porscherestoration #porsche #beforeandafter #projectcar #passionproject #classiccar #transformation #onestepcloser #porsche356 #porsche911 #porschebarnfind #oldcar #carrestoration #carstuff #carguy #cargirl #driveclassic #iwillfixyou

item.title: Trouble was originally slate gray but after hearing Chappell Roa...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Trouble was originally slate gray but after hearing Chappell Roan‚Äôs Pink Pony Club, I‚Äôve decided to reconsider my options‚Ä¶Trouble‚Äôs paintwork is imminent, get your paint colour in the comments! #porsche #porscherestoration #classiccarrestoration #projectcar #carpaint #paintjob #bodyshop #bodywork #classicporsche #classiccar #restomod #barnfind #builtnotbrought #pinkponyclub

item.title: I‚Äôm starting to learn that restoring a classic Porsche is just...
item.description:
View on Instagram


I‚Äôm starting to learn that restoring a classic Porsche is just a series of increasingly questionable financial decisions disguised as a hobby‚Ä¶.Who else has gone way over budget but somehow still needs more parts? Drop your restoration horror stories in the comments! #porsche #porsche356 #norisknoporsche #sendmomey #projectcarlife #classiccarrestoration #classiccarreality #whathaveidone #livinginacar

item.title: Trouble‚Äôs pedal box was barely holding on. A few more years in...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Trouble‚Äôs pedal box was barely holding on. A few more years in her leaky barn and it would have probably joined her battery and fallen out the floor to be lost forever.Luckily it didn‚Äôt‚Ä¶These pedal boxes are currently priced around ¬£400 online (un restored) so I‚Äôm pleased it held on, even if it is super duper rusty.I can work with rust but it‚Äôs hard to work with something that doesn‚Äôt exist.With some careful taps with a hammer, some wd-40, a few screwdriver slips, a hot air gun and some patience, I managed to take the pedal box to pieces and started cleaning the individual bits up.It never fails to amaze me how well steel can clean up. With some fresh paint and new plating it is starting to look like new again!Would you restore a rusty part like this or just buy a new one?#porsche #porscherestoration #oldporsche #classicporsche #classiccar #classiccarrestoration #cartransformation #carproject #porsche356 #porsche911 #driveclassic #restorationprocess #barnfind #pedalbox #pedalboxrestoration #lovecars
